acceptance_criteria.desc: every served page renders Tier-1 bar from nav.js, identical markup
Tier-1 = Sales/P&L/Deals filled + DataQuality/Sync outline; active=activeKeyForPath incl detail->parent
no page retains own top-nav markup (except slwa/debug JS-wired #back-link carve-out)
Sales=7 underline .stab in .subbar; Deals=segmented .wl-lens in .subbar; P&L+utility collapse strip
sticky theads on dq/sync/debug offset to top:var(--qs-nav-h)
zero NAV console errors; Deals lens still switches Live/Historical (offline: ignore /api fetch failures)
activeKeyForPath unit cases pass; / and /dashboard both -> sales
